title: martia polyandra
intro: Martia polyandra, also known as the Chinese club moss or Lycopodiopsida, is a type of ancient plant species belonging to the club moss family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic practices, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Martia polyandra include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Martia polyandra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
